Publish.LongDescription:
## Intro
Map Texture Replacer allows you to easily replace grass, dirt and cliff map textures ingame.
The mod is intended to be used with map texture packs. To find texture packs that work with this mod, search "maptex" in the PDXMods search.
Features include: * Dropdowns to easily change packs or individual textures on any map or savegame * Persistent settings between game loads * Texture tiling adjustments * Replacement of individual textures with any jpg/png from your computer
This mod takes advantage of the fact that map textures are stored as standard unity textures, making them straightforward to read and set.
## Map Texture Packs
The vanilla game uses 4096x4096 sized map textures by default for grass, 2048x2048 for dirt and cliff though smaller scaled textures will successfully replace. For example, the Desert Map Theme texture pack uses 1024x1024 sized textures.
## Texture Pack Creation
As of the 1.5.2f game patch, it's now possible to do this entirely in the vanilla editor!
Workflow:
1) Click "Environment" and in the opened panel scroll down to terrain rendering settings 2) Create a new terrain render settings prefab by clicking "Edit Terrain Rendering Settings" 3) After configuring, save the prefab package by clicking on the three dots next to "Environment" in the workspace window and click "Share Terrain Render Settings prefab". 4) Name/save the asset and then build it. The last publishing step can be optionally skipped if you are not sharing to PDXMods. 5) Restart the game and then a new entry will be selectable in the mod settings ingame
Advanced Features:
Legacy json based texture packs have support for far tiling breakpoints based on the camera height. See the GitHub repo for more info on how to use.
## Conclusion
If you like this mod be sure to leave an upvote! Thanks
Publish.ChangeLog: # v2.3 * Added ability for pack configs to set far distance tiling height breakpoints * Fixed mod icon size not updating in Universal Mods menu when adjusting global toolbar scaling * Added icon in dropdown for local texture packs * Added support to scan local Mods folder for legacy texture packs * Added settings toggle to optionally either show local or downloaded packs in dropdown
